title: SRO 4E DATED 13 FEB 1992
text: PAPERS TO BE LAID OF THE TABLE OF LOK/RAJYA SABHA AUTHENTICATED GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY PART II – SECTION 4 NOTIFICATION S.R.O. 4-E New Delhi,the 13 Feb11992 In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 123 of the Coast Guard Act, 1978 (30 of 1978), the Central Government hereby amends the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, as following namely:- 1. (1) These Rules may be called the Coast Guard (General) Amendment Rules, 1991 (2) They s ha11 come into forces on the date of t h e i r p u b l i c a t i o n i n t h e official Gazette. 2. In the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986 (hereinafter) referred to as the said rules), (1) rule 4, (a) after sub-rule (2), the following note shall be added, nam ely - "Note The authorities mentioned at clauses (a) to (c), shall be designated as Operational and Administrative Authorities·; (b) in sub-rule (3), for the words “and the Union Territories of Goa, the words “Goa and the Union Territories of shall be substituted. (2) in rule 26 of the said rules,:- (a) in sub-rule (5), - (i) after the opening portion beginning with the words “if a petition is preferred” and ending with the words “for its decision on the petition”, the following words shall be inserted, “The findings of the Appeal Medical Board shall be final”; -- 1 of 2 -- (ii) for the words “In case there is no difference in the findings of the two Medical Boards”, the words “Depending on the findings of the Appeal Medical Board” shall be substituted. (b) sub-rule (6) shall be omitted. 3. In the rule 40 of the said rules, in sub-rule (1) for the words “may be”, the words “shall be” shall be substituted. Foot Note The principal rules were notified under SRO 4(E) dated 2nd May 1986 of the Gazette of India Part-II section 4. (P Ray) Joint Secretary (Navy) -- 2 of 2 --
